The text discusses the importance of strengthening Linux server security against cyber-attacks, particularly in the era of AI-powered threats. The author highlights the common attack mechanisms, including malware, phishing, DDoS, SQL injection, and zero-day exploits. To enhance security, the author proposes leveraging Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Artificial Neural Networks (ANN) to create intelligent protection systems.
